title: bidens tubuaiensis
intro: Bidens tubuaiensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, commonly known as a daisy or bidens. It is native to the Austral Islands of French Polynesia and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing pain and inflammation and promoting wound healing. Bidens tubuaiensis can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
